narrative:
Ft. Recovery Village (precinct in Mercer County) has 977 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.1 percentage points.
